# DAIV

> Documentation for DAIV

DAIV is an open-source async software engineering agent that integrates natively with GitLab and GitHub through webhooks. Create an issue, get a merge request. Mention DAIV in a review, get the fix. Licensed under Apache 2.0.


## Getting Started

- [Deployment](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/getting-started/deployment/index.md): How to deploy DAIV with Docker
- [Platform Setup](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/getting-started/platform-setup/index.md): Setting up GitLab or GitHub integration
- [Accounts & Roles](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/getting-started/accounts/index.md): Dashboard sign-in, admin/member roles, and user management
- [LLM Providers](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/getting-started/llm-providers/index.md): Configuring LLM providers

## Features

- [Issue Addressing](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/issue-addressing/index.md): Automated issue-to-merge-request workflow
- [Pull Request Assistant](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/pull-request-assistant/index.md): AI-powered pull request reviews and fixes
- [Chat](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/chat/index.md): Interactive dashboard chat workspace with the agent
- [Jobs API](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/jobs-api/index.md): REST API for programmatic agent triggering
- [Scheduled Jobs](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/scheduled-jobs/index.md): Recurring agent runs on a cron schedule
- [MCP Endpoint](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/mcp-endpoint/index.md): MCP server endpoint for AI coding assistants
- [Activity Tracking](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/activity-tracking/index.md): Unified log of all agent executions
- [Notifications](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/notifications/index.md): Job, batch, and schedule completion notifications
- [Merge Metrics](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/merge-metrics/index.md): Code merge analytics and DAIV contribution tracking
- [Slash Commands & Skills](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/slash-commands/index.md): Slash commands and custom skills
- [Subagents](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/subagents/index.md): Specialized subagents for exploration and execution
- [Sandbox](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/sandbox/index.md): Secure sandboxed code execution
- [Sandbox Environments](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/features/sandbox-environments/index.md): Named, scoped sandbox environment configurations

## Integrations

- [Request Tracker Triage](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/integrations/rt/index.md): Request Tracker triage on ticket create via RT Scrip

## Customization

- [Repository Config](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/customization/repository-config/index.md): Per-repository configuration
- [Agent Skills](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/customization/agent-skills/index.md): Creating custom agent skills
- [MCP Tools](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/customization/mcp-tools/index.md): MCP tool integrations

## Reference

- [Environment Variables](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/reference/env-variables/index.md): Environment variables reference
- [Site Configuration](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/reference/site-configuration/index.md): Admin web UI for runtime configuration
- [Agent Architecture](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/reference/agent-architecture/index.md): Agent architecture overview
- [Monitoring](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/reference/monitoring/index.md): Monitoring and observability

## Community

- [Community](https://srtab.github.io/daiv/dev/community/index.md): Contributing, support, and project links
